title: Select Attributes
text: Select Attributes Select data processing attributes for nodes in the DTD tree. XML is typically used to define disconnected record sets. By selecting these attributes, you enable Uniface to reconnect disconnected occurrences, using reconnect or retrieve/reconnect Fields Disconnected Record Set Status ID Checksum (CRC) Validate Apply to children Related Links reconnect Reconnect data loaded from a disconnected record set (XML, JSON, or Struct) with the occurrences in a component and database (if connected). retrieve/reconnect Reconnect data loaded from a disconnected record set (XML, JSON, or Struct) with the occurrences in a database or component.
